CommunityApplications.Profile:
RifleJock's Unraid Community Apps repository.
**Plugins** - Storage Guard — free-space thresholds for array and pools; colors Main free bars and optional Unraid alerts.
Docker templates (Neos / Resonite headless) will return later.
Support: Storage Guard forum thread (topic 199796; URL slug may change if mods move the thread). Plugin source: https://github.com/ibigsnet/StorageGuard
